mapper.select:
select l.lec_id , m.mem_name , l.lec_title , l.price , l.capacity , l.cur_enrollment_cnt , l.lec_status , DATE_FORMAT(l.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as start_date , DATE_FORMAT(l.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as end_date from lecture l join member m on l.creator_id = m.mem_id where l.lec_status = 'OPEN'
and l.cur_enrollment_cnt < l.capacity
and not exists ( select 1 from enrollment e where e.lec_id = l.lec_id and e.mem_id = 3 and e.enroll_status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') ) order by l.created_at DESC
select count(*) from enrollment e join lecture l on e.lec_id = l.lec_id where mem_id = 3

select e.enroll_id , e.lec_id , l.lec_title , e.enroll_status , date_format(e.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at , date_format(e.confirmed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as confirmed_at , date_format(e.cancelled_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as cancelled_at , l.capacity , l.cur_enrollment_cnt from enrollment e join lecture l on e.lec_id = l.lec_id where e.mem_id = 3 order by e.created_at desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.insert: insert into enrollment ( lec_id , mem_id , enroll_status , created_at ) values ( #{lecId} , #{memId} , 'PENDING' , NOW() )
mapper.update:
update lecture set cur_enrollment_cnt = cur_enrollment_cnt + 1 where lec_id = #{lecId}
and cur_enrollment_cnt < capacity

update lecture set cur_enrollment_cnt = cur_enrollment_cnt - 1 where lec_id = #{lecId}
and cur_enrollment_cnt > 0
